description_long: This treadmill features a robust, modern design with a wide, black running belt supported by a sturdy metallic frame. The console area is equipped with a digital display screen, multiple control buttons, and a prominent emergency stop button, all housed within a sleek, angular dashboard. The handrails are ergonomically curved, extending from the console to the midpoint of the treadmill, providing stable support for users. The side rails and base are reinforced, with visible branding and a combination of dark blue and silver finishes. The treadmill's running surface is spacious, with side foot rails for safety and a slightly raised rear section. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for both home and gym environments.
description: A modern treadmill with a wide black running belt, digital console, and sturdy blue-silver frame. Ergonomic handrails and a spacious running surface highlight its robust, user-friendly design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide running belt, digital console, and ergonomic handrails extending outward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the treadmill's length, angled console, and the full profile of the handrails and frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the running belt, rear frame supports, and the treadmill's overall width.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, with clear visibility of the console, handrails, and side frame details.
attribute_control_panel: The control panel is centrally located above the running belt, featuring a digital display screen, several physical buttons, and a prominent red emergency stop button. There are also dedicated controls for speed and incline adjustments, all arranged within easy reach of the user.
attribute_running_belt: The running belt is wide and long, with a smooth black surface and subtle side rails for safety. It is positioned centrally within the frame, with visible cushioning and a slightly raised rear section.
attribute_handrails: The handrails are curved, extending from the console to the midpoint of the treadmill, and appear to have integrated grips for comfort. They are continuous and provide stable support on both sides.
attribute_display_screen: The display screen is rectangular, centrally mounted on the console, and appears to be digital with a clear interface. It is large enough for easy visibility during use.
attribute_power_cord: The power cord is not clearly visible in the provided images, and its attachment point or length cannot be determined from these views.
